title: E/I backlog triage: promote/park CANDIDATE ideas 0009-0014, add operator-friction closeout habit (IDEA-0010)
description: Operator asked to keep an eye on E/I as part of the full MAP renewal cycle (hcom #25059). 5 CANDIDATE ideas (IDEA-0009, 0010, 0011, 0013, 0014) had sat untriaged since 2026-07-02/03. Triaged all 5 with recorded reasoning: IDEA-0014 closed as PROMOTED_TO_TASK linking to TASK-144 (already in flight, no duplicate task needed); IDEA-0010 promoted -- adds a lightweight operator-friction closeout habit for CommandCenterUI/lab-workflow tasks, mirroring DEC-026's enforcement pattern; IDEA-0011 and IDEA-0013 parked as duplicative of the now-proven organic audit cadence (TASK-129/130/140/141/142/143/145) that IDEA-0012 already promoted a bounded version of; IDEA-0009 left CANDIDATE with a corroborating-evidence note (today's RnS presumed-down incident) since acting on it is an RnS/watcher implementation task, not an E/I triage decision, and is out of this task's scope.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 CANDIDATE ideas have an explicit status update with recorded reasoning (promote/park/left-candidate-with-note)
IDEA-0010's promotion includes a concrete, bounded guidance addition (closeout-habit text), not just a status flip
emergence/INDEX.md rebuilt and validate_events/map_emergence validate pass
